THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUNESS, ERICA MONJE, JEFF THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 780 PAGE #8 $400.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00, STAYED UNTIL NOV-01-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, MONEY JDMT AS TO JEFF MONJE ONLY.
